common.aboutShort: A non-profit healthcare foundation dedicated to providing accessible eye care and community medical services to those in need.

langModal.prompt: क्या आप हिन्दी में सहज हैं?

home.hospitalsDesc: Providing world-class healthcare facilities to communities in need through our dedicated medical centers.
home.projectsDesc: Discover how we're making a difference in communities through our various healthcare programs, camps, and ongoing initiatives.

about.title: About Jyoti Foundation Sanstha
about.missionDesc: To eradicate preventable blindness and provide comprehensive, affordable healthcare to underserved communities.
about.visionDesc: A world where quality eye care and basic medical services are a right, not a privilege, accessible to everyone regardless of their socio-economic status.
about.valuesDesc: Compassion, Excellence, Integrity, and Community-first approach in every aspect of our medical and humanitarian work.
about.journeyP1: Jyoti Foundation began its journey with a simple yet profound goal: to bring light into the lives of those suffering from curable eye diseases. What started as a small initiative has grown into a comprehensive healthcare network.
about.journeyP2: Through the establishment of Apollo Laser Eye Hospital in Moradabad and Dr Vinod Hospital in Hasanpur, we have created permanent centers of excellence that serve thousands of patients annually.
about.journeyP3: Beyond our hospital walls, our outreach programs and free medical camps venture deep into rural areas, ensuring that geographical distance and financial constraints do not prevent anyone from receiving necessary medical care.
about.committeeSub: Meet the dedicated professionals who guide Jyoti Foundation's mission and operations.

ourWork.title: Our Impact in Action
ourWork.subtitle: Explore our recent initiatives and community outreach programs making a tangible difference.
ourWork.noResults: No results found for this category.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Have questions or want to support our mission? We're here to help and would love to hear from you.
contact.successMsg: Success! Your message has been sent.
contact.errorMsg: Error sending message. Please try again.

donate.title: Support Our Mission
donate.subtitle: Your contribution helps us provide essential medical services to those who need it most. Every donation, big or small, makes a significant difference.

options.cataractDesc: Sponsor a life-changing cataract surgery for one patient.
options.patientDesc: Provide comprehensive medical care and medicine for a patient.
options.campDesc: Fund a full day of medical outreach camp in a rural village.

donate.upiDesc: Use the UPI ID below for instant bank-to-bank transfer.
donate.bankDesc: Direct deposit or wire transfer to our official foundation bank account.
donate.bankNameValue: Union Bank of India, Overseas Branch, Moradabad
donate.taxInfoDesc: All donations to Jyoti Foundation are tax-exempt under section 80G of the Income Tax Act. You will receive an official receipt for your contribution.
